entries.definition:
f–n–n branches of a tree, locks of hair; variety, type, variation
on a theme, types of expression, people of various backgrounds.
Of this root, أَفْنَان ʾafnān, occurs once in the Qur’an.

أَفْنَان ʾafnān [pl. n.; sing. فَنَن fanan or فَنّ fann] branches,
varieties (55:48) ذَوَاتَا أَفْنَانٍ the two with hanging branches.
